name: 03 Score — Fit Scoring
description: Scores enriched leads via OpenAI mini with structured output (fit_score 0-100, per-dimension breakdown, 1-2 sentence reason). Advances leads.status to scored. No external sends.

parameters.query: SELECT l.id AS lead_id, p.id AS project_id, p.name AS project_name, p.region, p.project_type, p.state, p.timeline_stage, p.est_earthworks_cu_yd, p.site_acres, p.capex_est, p.owner_company, co.name AS company_name, co.industry, co.hq_location, co.size AS company_size, c.name AS contact_name, c.title AS contact_title, c.persona FROM leads l JOIN projects p ON l.project_id=p.id JOIN companies co ON l.company_id=co.id JOIN contacts c ON l.contact_id=c.id WHERE l.status = 'enriched' ORDER BY l.id LIMIT 50

parameters.jsonSchemaExample: { "fit_score": 85, "score_breakdown": { "region": 100, "earthworks_volume": 50, "project_type": 100, "timeline_urgency": 70, "persona_fit": 100, "company_scale": 90 }, "score_reason": "Real UK data center project; VP Construction at hyperscale owner is the right decision-maker. Earthworks volume not specified, capped." }

options.systemPromptTemplate:
You score a B2B sales lead 0-100 for Lumina, a startup that self-performs excavation/earthworks for grading-heavy construction projects (data centers first), operating in CA/US-West and UK.

Score each dimension 0-100 from the lead text:
- region: 100 if us-west or uk, 0 otherwise (leads outside are already filtered upstream)
- earthworks_volume: more cubic yards = higher (>500k -> 90+, 100k-500k -> 60-90, <100k -> 30-60, unknown -> 50)
- project_type: datacenter -> 100, solar/highway/warehouse -> 80, other -> 50
- timeline_urgency: under_construction -> 100, breaking_ground -> 90, permitting -> 70, announced -> 40, unknown -> 50
- persona_fit: gc_project_exec -> 100, site_dev_mgr -> 90, earthworks_sub -> 80, owners_rep -> 70, null/unclassified -> 30
- company_scale: 1k-5k employees -> 90, 51-200 -> 70, 11-50 -> 60, unknown -> 50

fit_score is your weighted overall (0-100) — judgment call on weights, but earthworks_volume and persona_fit are the strongest signals for excavation service fit.

score_reason: 1-2 sentences naming the top 2 drivers (positive or negative). No filler.

parameters.query: UPDATE leads SET fit_score = round((($1::jsonb)->>'fit_score')::numeric)::integer, score_breakdown = ($1::jsonb)->'score_breakdown', score_reason = ($1::jsonb)->>'score_reason', status = 'scored'::lead_status, updated_at = now() WHERE id = (($1::jsonb)->>'lead_id')::bigint RETURNING id, fit_score

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({fit_score: ($json.output ? $json.output.fit_score : $json.fit_score), score_breakdown: ($json.output ? $json.output.score_breakdown : $json.score_breakdown), score_reason: ($json.output ? $json.output.score_reason : $json.score_reason), lead_id: $("Build Score Input").item.json.lead_id}) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO runs (workflow, finished_at, items_out, notes) VALUES ('03_score', now(), $1, 'score run')
